title: COMPUTER LAB - 211info
text: ILLINOIS VALLEY FAMILY COALITION COMPUTER LAB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers computer, printer, and internet access to members of the community to help find employment, housing, and other information and services. 535 E River Street Cave Junction, OR 97523 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4:30pm Email (541) 592-6139 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 592-6139 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None, donations accepted DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Cities of Cave Junction, Kerby, O'Brien, and Selma Services: Public Internet Access Sites Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - RESUME AND JOB SEARCH ASSISTANCE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OHP ASSISTANCE NAVIGATION PROGRAM INFORMATION SERVICES - INFORMATION AND REFERRAL MATERIAL GOODS - BASIC NEEDS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ILLINOIS VALLEY FAMILY COALITION
